desc: Decompose bin/roadmap.ts (2064 lines) into src/cli/ modules. Each command becomes a self-contained module. bin/roadmap.ts shrinks to a thin router (~150 lines): arg parsing, gitsafe, trail, error handling, and a switch statement that delegates to cli/ modules.

init.desc: Anchor: bin/roadmap.ts is 2064-line monolith with 20+ inline command functions. src/cli/ has 3 thin wrappers (make.ts, orient.ts, advance.ts) from convergence DAG that aren't wired in.

extract-shared.desc: Extract shared CLI infrastructure from bin/roadmap.ts into src/cli/shared.ts: DAG loading (loadDAGWithAutoMerge + migrateSingleHead + ensureConsolidated), trail recording (appendTrail), gitsafe enforcement (enforceMainBranch + safeReadFile), output helpers (json, emit wrappers), findRepoRoot + setRepoRoot init. All command modules will import from shared.ts.

validate.command: grep -q 'export function loadDAG\|export function appendTrail\|export function enforceMainBranch' src/cli/shared.ts

extract-small.desc: Extract cmdStatus (52 lines), cmdApi (77 lines), and cmdHelp (66 lines) from bin/roadmap.ts into src/cli/status.ts, src/cli/api.ts, src/cli/help.ts. Each exports a single run() function. Wire them into bin/roadmap.ts router (replace inline functions with imports).

extract-dag-group.desc: Extract cmdDagGroup + cmdDagInsert/Remove/Modify/Log (211 lines) from bin/roadmap.ts into src/cli/dag.ts. Exports run() that sub-routes insert/remove/modify/log. Wire into bin/roadmap.ts router.

extract-spec-group.desc: Extract cmdSpecGroup + cmdPlanRouter/Gallery/Select/Status + cmdSpecMigrate (237 lines) from bin/roadmap.ts into src/cli/spec.ts. Exports run() that sub-routes plan/migrate. Wire into bin/roadmap.ts router.

extract-orient.desc: Replace the thin src/cli/orient.ts (27 lines) with the full cmdOrient logic (168 lines) extracted from bin/roadmap.ts. Handles DAG loading, completion-based orient, brief generation per node, chain context, claim annotation, human rendering. Wire into bin/roadmap.ts router.

extract-make.desc: Replace the thin src/cli/make.ts (30 lines) with the full cmdMake logic (261 lines) extracted from bin/roadmap.ts. Handles spec parsing, tasks normalization, DAG creation via tasksToDAG, define/verify/check validation, spec-origin tracking, head.json writing, chain initialization. Wire into bin/roadmap.ts router.

extract-advance.desc: Replace the thin src/cli/advance.ts (27 lines) with the full cmdAdvance logic (499 lines) extracted from bin/roadmap.ts. This is the largest and most complex command — handles single-node advance (validator execution, evidence recording, completion writing, handoff journaling, brief caching) and batch advance (batch validation, next-batch orientation). Wire into bin/roadmap.ts router.

thin-router.desc: Rewrite bin/roadmap.ts as a thin router. Delete all extracted cmdFoo functions. What remains: shebang, imports from src/cli/*, arg parsing (rawArgs, note, cmd extraction), KNOWN_COMMANDS gate, the routeCommand switch statement that delegates to cli/ modules, and top-level error handling. Target: under 200 lines.

term.desc: CLI decomposition complete. bin/roadmap.ts is under 200 lines. All commands route through src/cli/ modules. 286+ tests pass. Build clean. No command behavior changed — only structure.
